entry.title: From Night Markets to a One-Way Flight
entry.summary: Before Silicon Valley, there was a kid shaped by night markets, failure, and a quiet decision to try one more time.

Not strategy. Just instinct: follow what feels right, one step at a time."),mdx("p",null,`I didn\u2019t grow up thinking about Silicon Valley.
I grew up thinking about where to eat next.`),mdx("h2",null,"The First Shift"),mdx("p",null,"University was the first time life stopped being automatic."),mdx("p",null,"I chose computer science without a master plan. Different rules I didn\u2019t grow up learning."),mdx("ul",null,mdx("li",{parentName:"ul"},"Resume rewritten in English, again and again"),mdx("li",{parentName:"ul"},"Interviews at 7am, trying to sound confident while half-awake"),mdx("li",{parentName:"ul"},"Coding questions that felt more like performance than engineering")),mdx("p",null,"I failed my first attempt."),mdx("p",null,"Then the second."),mdx("p",null,"Then the third."),mdx("p",null,"Not \u201Calmost.\u201D Not \u201Cclose.\u201D Just \u2014 no."),mdx("p",null,`At some point, it stops being about skill.

Then silence that felt longer than it actually was."),mdx("p",null,"And then:"),mdx("p",null,"An offer."),mdx("p",null,"No celebration. No big reaction. This wasn\u2019t the result of confidence.`),mdx("p",null,"It was the result of not stopping."),mdx("h2",null,"The In-Between Space"),mdx("p",null,"Six weeks later, I was holding a one-way ticket."),mdx("p",null,`Two suitcases.
An address I had never seen in person.
A version of myself I hadn\u2019t met yet.`),mdx("p",null,"Everything familiar stayed behind \u2014 language, rhythm, the unspoken rules of how to exist comfortably."),mdx("p",null,"What I carried forward wasn\u2019t certainty."),mdx("p",null,"It was something more fragile, but more important:"),mdx("p",null,"The willingness to step into a world where I didn\u2019t belong \u2014 yet."),mdx("h2",null,"What This Chapter Means"),mdx("p",null,"Looking back, this phase of my life wasn\u2019t about success."),mdx("p",null,"It was about ",mdx("strong",{parentName:"p"},"permission"),"."),mdx("p",null,`Permission to try without guarantees.
Permission to fail without redefining myself downward.
Permission to choose a harder path without explaining it to everyone.`),mdx("p",null,`Taiwan gave me instinct.
Failure gave me clarity.`),mdx("p",null,"And somewhere between the two, I earned the right to take that flight."),mdx("p",null,"The next chapter begins when the plane lands."))}MDXContent.isMDXComponent=!0;
